title: scytanthus andrieuxii
intro: Scytanthus andrieuxii, also known as the Mexican evening primrose or evening primrose, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Scytanthus andrieuxii are attributed to its high levels of antioxidants and essential fatty acids, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Scytanthus andrieuxii can be made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water or oil to create a tea or tincture that can be used to support overall well-being.
